summary: Implement GitHub issues — load issue context, define or follow agent workflow, review diffs, push and close.

entry.use_when: User wants to implement a tracked GitHub issue end-to-end

subcommands.use_when: Run the full implementation flow for a specific issue

interface.note: Output files (if any) share the gh_planner namespace so project_summary.md and project_detail.md remain the single source of truth.
